def solve(prices, strategy, k)
    n = prices.length
    original_profit = 0
    n.times do |i|
        original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i]
    end

    m = k / 2
    a = Array.new(n) { |i| -strategy[i] * prices[i] }
    b = Array.new(n) { |i| (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i] }

    prefix_a = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_b = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0...n).each do |i|
        prefix_a[i + 1] = prefix_a[i] + a[i]
        prefix_b[i + 1] = prefix_b[i] + b[i]
    end

    max_delta = 0
    (0...n - k + 1).each do |i|
        sum_a = prefix_a[i + m] - prefix_a[i]
        sum_b = prefix_b[i + k] - prefix_b[i + m]
        delta = sum_a + sum_b
        max_delta = [max_delta, delta].max
    end

    original_profit + max_delta
end
